items.summary: Create a full-screen entrance/landing screen with a soft radial gradient background (white to #f4ecd8), an italic subtitle 'A secret garden for Priya...' in muted grey, and a gold-bordered 'ENTER' button with uppercase letter-spacing styling. Clicking the button fades out and hides the landing screen, then fades in the main content.

Build the main content area (max-width 600px, centered) with: an italic serif heading 'For My Everything', a gold horizontal divider line, and a subtitle 'Tap each bloom to reveal my heart...' in small muted italic text.

Implement a 3×2 flower grid containing 6 flower emoji items (🌹, 🌸, 🌷, 🌻, 🌼, 🌺). Each flower starts with a desaturated/sepia filter. When clicked, it reveals its message and gets marked as 'viewed' (full color, slightly scaled down). Hovering scales up and removes desaturation.

Implement a message display area (height 250px, scrollable) with double gold top and bottom borders. When a flower is clicked, display the corresponding message with a fade-in animation. The 6 messages must match exactly: (0) the long personal message about getting lost in her, voice as medicine, phone being taken; (1) 'Every time I think of you, I realize how lucky I am...'; (2) 'I wanted to find a way to tell you that the small things you do...'; (3) 'There is a quiet strength in you that I admire...'; (4) 'If I could give you one thing, it would be the ability to see yourself through my eyes...'; (5) 'This isn't just a message; it's a promise...'

Show a hidden pulsing 'For You, Priya ❤️' button (red/rose background, rounded pill shape, italic serif font, pulse animation) only after all 6 flowers have been viewed. Clicking it triggers a heart burst animation and reveals a final thank-you modal.

Implement a heart burst particle animation: when triggered, spawn 100 ❤️/💖 emoji particles from the center of the screen that fly outward in random directions across the full viewport, fading out over 3 seconds, then remove themselves from the DOM.

Show a centered modal overlay after triggering the surprise, displaying the thank-you message: '"Thank you for spending your valuable time with me. My cutee, I will be forever grateful to you for everything. I hope I've been able to make you feel special and bring a smile to your face today."' followed by '— I admire you more than words can say. —' and a gold '[ Close ]' button that dismisses the modal. Style with parchment background, gold border, rounded corners, and drop shadow.

Apply a consistent parchment/gold/ink visual theme across the entire app: background color #fdfaf1 (parchment), primary text #3a3535 (ink), accent #c5a059 (gold), highlight #e74c3c (love/red). Use Georgia serif font throughout. Footer reads 'ETERNALLY YOURS' in small gold uppercase letter-spaced text.
